title: Hokk
content:
{{Top|ca|leg}} {{Character |type=Sith Empire |image= |name=Hokk |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Disciples of Ragnos]]''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Hokk, do you read?''"
"''I read you, J'aahn.''"
"''Meet me at station Six-C.|J'aahn and Hokk|}} '''Hokk''' was a member of the [[Disciples of Ragnos]], a cult that wanted to revive the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Marka Ragnos]], who had [[Death/Legends|died]] in [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]].[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 2]] In [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]],According to ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'', the events in the game take place ten [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which according to the ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' is placed in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. Hokk, along with others such as [[J'aahn]], took part in an attempt to disable a [[Hovertrain/Legends|cargo train]] in bustling [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]], [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Jaden Korr]] and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kyle Katarn]], who were in Coronet [[City/Legends|City]] to investigate reports of Disciples of Ragnos activity, heard a distress call from the cargo train. Korr quickly made his way over; when the Padawan arrived, Hokk was going to meet J'aahn at Station Six-C, but Korr [[Mission to Corellia (Disciples of Ragnos crisis)|stopped]] the cultists before they could. ==Behind the scenes== Hokk's voice appeared in the [[Raven Software]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'', released in [[2003]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1st}} {{Voice}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Disciples of Ragnos members]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]]
